textPlain: The bitterest lesson is that AI is improving. It didn't actually hit a wall. The first product was to early... it failed because AI was not good enough. Back then everyone said we hit a wall.Now the AI is good enough. People are still saying we hit a wall. Are you guys sure?He learned lesson about building a product with AI that was incapable. What happens when AI is so capable it negates all these specialized products?AI is not in a bubble. This technology will change the world. The bubble are people like this guy trying to build GUI's around AI to smooth out the rough parts which are constantly getting better and better.
i've not been impressed since gpt3.5
